channel.title: SoCal Real Estate Insights — Jesse Oñate
channel.description: Monthly market updates, buyer and seller deep-dives, and unfiltered takes on Southern California real estate from Downey-area realtor Jesse Oñate.

image.title: SoCal Real Estate Insights — Jesse Oñate

item.title: Should I Refinance in 2026? A Plain-English Guide
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: Real-talk refi guide for SoCal homeowners who closed at 7%+ in 2023-2024. Break-even math, closing cost reality, and when waiting beats refinancing.

item.title: SoCal Mortgage Rate Watch — October 2026
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: Post-Fed-cut October update. Year-low rates, fall closing window, and refi math for 2024 closers in Downey, Whittier, and the surrounding SoCal cities.

item.title: Down Payment Assistance in California — Programs SoCal Buyers Are Actually Using
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: CalHFA MyHome, ADDI, Forgivable Equity Builder, GSFA, and CDA — what's available, who qualifies, and how stacking can save SoCal first-time buyers $30K+ on a Pico Rivera or Whittier home.

item.title: SoCal Mortgage Rate Watch — September 2026
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: September 2026 SoCal mortgage rate update: Fed signaling, fall buying season setup, and how Downey-area buyers and sellers should play the next 90 days.

item.title: How to Price Your SoCal Home — The First 14 Days Decide Everything
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: The first 14 days of a SoCal listing decide its outcome. How to price your home to maximize buyer interest, avoid price drops, and net more at closing.

item.title: Pre-Approval vs Pre-Qualification — Why It Matters in SoCal
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: In SoCal's market, sellers don't take buyers seriously without a verified pre-approval. The real difference between pre-qual and pre-approval — and why it costs you offers.

item.title: SoCal Mortgage Rate Watch — June 2026
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: June 2026 SoCal mortgage rate update: where rates settled heading into summer and how Downey-area buyers and sellers should play it.

item.title: Mello-Roos Explained — What SoCal Homebuyers Need to Know
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: Mello-Roos can add $3,000-$8,000 a year to your SoCal property tax bill. A plain-English breakdown of what it is, where it hides, and how to spot it before you offer.

item.title: Bilingual Realtor in Downey — Why It Actually Matters
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: Beyond translation: what to actually look for in a bilingual realtor when buying or selling in Downey, Whittier, Pico Rivera, and southeast LA.

item.title: SoCal Spring Buying Season — Why May 2026 Is Different
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: Spring 2026 SoCal real estate is breaking the usual playbook. Lower rates, tight inventory, fewer showings — here's how Downey-area buyers and sellers should actually play it.

item.title: SoCal Mortgage Rate Watch — April 2026
item.dc:creator: Jesse Oñate
item.description: April 2026 SoCal mortgage rate update: where rates landed, what's driving the move, and what it means for Downey-area buyers and sellers in May.
